name: add_assoc
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem add_assoc (a b c : ℕ) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) := by
  induction c with
  | zero =>
    rw [add_zero, add_zero]
  | succ c ih =>
    rw [Nat.add_succ, Nat.add_succ, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]
    rw [ih]
    ring
```

name: list_filter_def
output:
```lean4
def filter (p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | (x :: xs) =>
    if p x then
      x :: filter p xs
    else
      filter p xs
```

name: or_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem disjunction_comm {P Q : Prop} : P ∨ Q ↔ Q ∨ P := by
  constructor
  intro h
  rcases h with h | h
  exact Or.inr h
  exact Or.inl h
  intro h
  rcases h with h | h
  exact Or.inr h
  exact Or.inl h
```

name: double_negation
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
import Decidable
theorem not_not_iff (P : Prop) [Decidable P] : ¬¬P ↔ P := by
  apply iff_iff_implies_and_implies.mpr
  constructor
  · intro h
    cases decidable_of_neg_decidable P with
    | isTrue p => exact p
    | isFalse np =>
      exfalso
      exact h np
  · intro h
    intro h'
    cases decidable_of_neg_decidable P with
    | isTrue p => exact h p
    | isFalse np => exact h p
```

name: demorgan_or
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
theorem demorgan : ¬(P ∨ Q) ↔ ¬P ∧ ¬Q := ⟨fun h => ⟨fun hp => h (Or.inl hp), fun hq => h (Or.inr hq)⟩, fun h => by
  intro h'
  cases h with
  | intro hp hq =>
    cases h' with
    | inl hp' => contradiction
    | inr hq' => contradiction⟩
```

```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop

open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem [Nonempty α] {P Q R : α → Prop} (hP : ∀ x, P x → Q x) (hQ : ∀ x, Q x → R x) :
    ∀ x, P x → R x := by
  intro x h
  apply hQ x
  apply hP x
  assumption
```

name: comp_injective
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib

theorem compose_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : α → β) (g : β → γ) (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (g ∘ f) := by
  intro x y h
  have h1 : f x = f y := by
    apply hg
    exact h
  apply hf
  exact h1
```

name: group_inv_inv
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib

lemma inverse_inverse {G : Type u_1} [Group G] (a : G) : (a⁻¹)⁻¹ = a := by
  rw [inv_eq_iff_mul_eq_one]
  have h : a * a⁻¹ = 1 := by
    exact mul_inv_self a
  rwa [h, mul_comm]
```
